author: Swapnil Patel
name: Warmdown-Tuned Training on 1xRTX 5090
blurb: Systematic experiment-driven optimization across 8 experiments. Key findings: warmdown phase produces disproportionate BPB gains, batch=65536 optimal for single GPU, position degradation is architectural not training-dependent. Best result 1.312 BPB on 1xRTX 5090 (1200s). Applying for H100 compute grant to scale up.
